concerns.text: T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' lacks concrete deliverable. Should name specific directories/files (e.g., 'Create data/raw/, data/processed/, data/logs/, code/, tests/ directories and __init__.py files').

T008 'Setup environment configuration management' is vague. Should name the artifact (e.g., 'Create .env.example with MODEL_PATH, TIMEOUT, DATASET_VERSION variables' or 'Create config.yaml with schema').

T039 'Write contract tests for all data schemas in tests/contract/' is too coarse. Should name specific test files (e.g., 'test_humaneval_schema.py, test_metrics_schema.py, test_analysis_report_schema.py').

T041 'Verify all FRs are covered' is a meta-verification task with no concrete deliverable. Either remove or convert to a checklist artifact (e.g., 'Create fr_coverage_matrix.md documenting FR-001 through FR-010 task mappings').
T043 'Code cleanup and refactoring for maintainability' has no concrete deliverable or verification criteria. Should specify (e.g., 'Run ruff check --fix and black --check; ensure 0 violations').

T045 'Additional unit tests in tests/unit/ for edge cases' is vague. Should name specific test files and edge cases (e.g., 'tests/unit/test_simplify_edge_cases.py for empty code, None inputs, deeply nested structures').
